ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , "未申請")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , "所属課長")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , "所属部長")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( ApprovalStatus__c , "承認済"))) , ISCHANGED( CheckResultJudgment__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 申請中は編集できません
